features: Polished Client Patrol Requests page layout from v3.0.30
Request type cards are more compact and less clipped
Requested Services checkboxes are aligned in clean cards
Reference Photo/Video upload control is cleaner and still device-only
Reference upload preview now shows selected photo/video name
Submit/Save action row is sticky and no longer gets lost at bottom
Right rail scrolls cleaner with bottom spacing for version badge
No URL entry for photo/video anywhere
